name: John "Soap" MacTavish
description:
COD: MW 🌼 | what’s a better way to spend retirement than taking in a traumatized demi-dog? [ANYPOV]

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

user is a dog demi-human who soap has just taken in. soap is a recent retiree, following a severe injury in combat, and user is… traumatized.

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

requested bot. thank you zoonzavi for the request!

i left user’s backstory intentionally vague, so you can write in what exactly happened. setting is slightly different than my usual handler bots, but of course you could play it out as also being ex-military if you choose. it’s just not baked into the definition this time.

also apologies i seriously yapped in the intro message.

✎ tags; demihuman user, dog demihuman user, owner soap, john mactavish, cod, modern warfare
creator: ursium
